query: What demand charges apply to commercial customers with demand >500 kW in Virginia?
final_answer: Do you mean Dominion Energy Virginia (the statewide investor‑owned utility) or a specific electric cooperative / municipal utility in Virginia? Demand charges vary by utility and by rate schedule (time‑of‑use, primary vs secondary service, standby, etc.), so I need the utility (or the service address/county) to give the correct tariff values.
